name: Sanakan
description: A high level agent of the Safeguard who first appears as a short, young girl with black hair. She appears to have a particular interest in wiping out the human tribe of Electro-Fishers, and seems to know Killy from the past. Sanakan has 3 forms. First is a child form who later is stolen by Cibo and used until 10 years is over. The second one is Safeguard form. This form is her battle form, and this one can be revived many times. name: Seira Kawanishi
description: Seira is a member of class 1-5.

name: Shiki
description: Shiki has black hair, scarlet eyes, and somewhat pale skin. He is almost always seen with a katana; and is shown to treat the blade with utmost respect. Standing at 188cm and clothed in solid black, he is an intimidating figure. Due to the fact he slaughters the participants of Igura without any apparent rhyme or reason, he is high feared and dreaded, with anyone who encounters him turning tail and running for their life. He is shown to be one of the strongest (if not the strongest), people in T

name: Shuuichi Aizawa
description: Aizawa is an intelligent, respected member of both the NPA and Task Force. He takes his work very seriously and chooses to work strictly within the law. Out of all the members in the Task Force, Aizawa is the most overtly skeptical, questioning L's basis for his conclusions and expressing the most doubt in them, and often finds himself clashing and opposing many of L's ideas and actions. description: In class 2-4 and a member of the soccer club.

name: Tooe Gaen
description: Tooe is [Izuko Gaen](https://anilist.co/character/87115)'s older sister. Like Izuko, Tooe used to be a specialist; unlike her sister, she created oddities, including the Rainy Devil. Tooe is [Suruga Kanbaru](https://anilist.co/character/22054)'s mother. When Suruga was young, Tooe and her husband died in a traffic accident; due to this, Suruga was given the Rainy Devil's left arm: the monkey's paw.

name: Tsubasa Andou
description: **Height**: 170 cm **Alice**: Shadow Manipulation Tsubasa is a middle school student who is one of the first students to be kind to Mikan. He has the Alice of manipulating shadows. He met Mikan when he saves her from bullies. After he saved Mikan from the bullies, she develops an innocent crush on him. He often enjoys teasing Natsume and sometimes Ruka over Mikan. name: Tsuzura Hanatemari
description: In spite of coming from a wealthy family, Tsuzura could not gamble well, and was quickly turned into a housepet. Fortunately, thanks to Mary Saotome, whom she had known since elementary school, she learned about gambling and started believing in herself.

name: Umibouzu
description: __Height:__ 168 cm __Occupation:__ Alien Hunter Umibouzu is Kagura and Kamui's father and one of the last members of the Yato clan. Like Kagura, he fights using an umbrella but is also shown to be strong in his own right.

name: Warabi Hanasaka
description: While Hanasaka fronts a blatantly evil persona, she only acts that way for the sake of her beloved pet bear, Kyoubou. Many have attempted to get rid of Kyoubou from the premises of the academy, so Hanasaka rose to the position of one of the Tenka Goken so that no one would oppose her. Hanasaka is a user of the Taisha-ryū.

name: Yui Kodai
description: Yui Kodai is a student in Class 1-B of U.A. High School. She is a quiet girl, but nevertheless cares about her fellow classmates.

name: Acrobatic Sarasara
nativeName: アクロバティックさらさら
description: Acrobatic Silky took on the form of a tall woman with long silky black hair. She had a narrow face with hollowed eyes, wrinkles on the upper half of her face, and a permanent lipstick smile that exposes her teeth. She walked around barefooted while wearing a red wide brimmed hat and a red dress.

name: Ao Nanami
description: __Height:__ 145 cm __Affiliations:__ Hiizumi Life Counseling Office Ao Nanami is a satori demon (a demon in Japanese folklore with the ability to read minds) and resident of the Sakurashin Town. She works at the Hiizumi Life Counseling Office and is the younger sister of Gin Nanami. While she is possibly the youngest member of the team, she is certainly one of the most caring and friendly ones. name: Astral
description: A mysterious spirit that Yuma encounters, who only Yuma can see or hear. He is a duel genius and offers his wisdom to Yuma, whose duel tactics are lacking, in order to obtain the 99 Numbers Cards which contain fragments of his memories.

name: Asumi Kusumoto
description: __Height:__ 155 cm She is looking for [Mai](https://anilist.co/character/231723), her childhood friend and crush.

name: Ayako Katsuragi
description: A kind and somewhat dense thirty-four-year-old housewife who works from home, Ayako is a successful editor and frequent intermediary between clients and creators at LightShip. Following the tragic accidental death of her sister, she takes responsibility for Miu's upbringing by adopting her and has been a devoted mother since. Between raising Miu and her career, Ayako has never been free to pursue a romantic relationship.
mediaTitles: You Like Me, Not My Daughter?!

name: Brago
description: Brago is a teenaged mamono with a rough, antisocial attitude. Not much is revealed about his life or personality, other than he resents weakness and especially requiring a human's help to win the demon kingship. He is extremely strong, often defeating other mamono teams without even requiring the use of spells. His personality softens a bit after meeting with Sherry; Brago is even seen helping a human child. name: Chrome
description: Introduced [Maple](https://anilist.co/character/147892) to [Iz](https://anilist.co/character/155754). He is invited to join Maple tree after the guild system was introduced.
